outlook_paragraph: Ovintiv shows moderate drilling activity with 7 active sites at decision date, 20% above recent historical levels, driven by one newly activated pad. With half of production exposed to WTI-linked prices and a stable realized price environment at 90% of benchmark, revenue is supported by steady operational performance. The deterministic forecast of $1.76B reflects this balanced activity and mid-tier commodity pricing. Drilling momentum is modest but consistent, concentrated in a few core areas.
